---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sarthak10193
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/sarthak10193
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sarthak10193@gmail.com
---

I work on ML infrastructure, GPU programming, and distributed systems.

These posts are my notes — things I found interesting, confusing, or worth writing down carefully. Topics include CUDA kernels, quantization, attention mechanisms, distributed training, and systems design for ML.
